{{Expand Japanese|速雨神社}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hayasame Shrine
| native_name = 速雨神社
| image = Hayasame shrine, Tokushima.jpg
| mapframe = yes

| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Hayasame Shrine'''|速雨神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称= Hayasame Shrine
|画像= [[File:Hayasame shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
|所在地= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}{{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|qid=Q11390732|1=Hata, Tokushima}} Itahigashi 91
|位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
|祭神= {{ill|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime no Kami|1=Toyotama-hime}}
|社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}・former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}
|創建= unknown
|本殿= 
|別名= Hayaame Shrine
|例祭= 
|神事= 
|地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=速雨神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''Hayasame Shrine''' (はやさめじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|qid=Q11390732|1=Hata, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}.

=== History ===
The founding year is unknown. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}, the reading of Hayasame Shrine is "hayaame." Its popular name is "Ame-no-miya," and it is said to have spiritual efficacy for praying for rain. The former bettō temple was {{ill|lt=Kinryū-ji (Tokushima City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kinryū-ji}} of {{ill|lt=Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Q3077357|qid=Q3077357|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}}.

In the {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}}, together with {{ill|lt=Umorihiko Shrine|Q11449442|qid=Q11449442|1=Umorihiko Shrine}} in Moritoki, Hatta-chō, it was listed as an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. In the precincts stands a {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|qid=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} designated by Tokushima City as a natural monument.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime no Mikoto|1=Toyotama-hime}}

=== Access ===
* About 30 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|qid=Q860775|1=Tokushima Station}} on {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}.

=== References ===
* ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|qid=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' (1986, ISBN 4040013603)
